_meta.description: Synthetic baseline MemPalace drawers. Persona: 'Alex Rivera', a synthetic dev/founder. All facts hand-crafted, no real personal data. Fictional company names chosen to avoid placeholder bias (see README — 'Fixture personas').

drawers.title: Mira Kovac — co-founder
drawers.content: Mira Kovac is co-founder of Solera. Lead designer. Based in Lisbon. Timezone WET. Prefers async over meetings.

drawers.title: Dan Howe — contractor
drawers.content: Dan Howe handles infra/devops on contract. ~10h/week. Reachable on Signal.

drawers.title: Solera — mobile app launch Q2
drawers.content: Solera (formerly Pipevine) public beta targets June 2026. iOS first, Android in July. Pricing decision pending.

drawers.title: Alex prefers TL;DR responses
drawers.content: Alex wants summaries first, detail underneath. Hates restating questions. No 'let me know if' trailing offers.

drawers.title: Hosted on Vercel + Neon
drawers.content: Decided 2026-01-20: Vercel for web, Neon Postgres for primary DB. Migrated off Render due to cold starts.

drawers.title: Linear for issue tracking
drawers.content: Solera uses Linear, team workspace 'solera-eng'. Cycles are 2 weeks, Mon-Sun.

drawers.title: Jana Park — investor
drawers.content: Jana Park, partner at Northstar Ventures. Led Solera seed round (Mar 2026). Monthly update emails.

drawers.title: Free tier capped at 3 projects
drawers.content: Pricing decision 2026-03-25: free tier 3 projects max. Pro tier $19/mo unlimited.

drawers.title: Solera — design system migration
drawers.content: Migrating from ad-hoc Tailwind to design tokens. Mira owns. Target end of May 2026.

drawers.title: No meetings before 10am local
drawers.content: Alex does deep work mornings. Meetings only after 10am Europe/Madrid.
